title: DGAF Governance YAML Schema
description: Pydantic-enforced schema for governance.yml. extra=forbid. All downstream kernels, CI gates, and eval harnesses derive from this file.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this governance schema (e.g. 1.0.0)

session_id.description: DGAF session identifier at time of governance.yml generation

roles.description: Array of role definitions. Each role is a typed kernel entry.

curvature.description: Role curvature scalar. Controls governance trajectory curvature.

contraction_rate.description: Spectral radius rho of role transition operator. Must be < 1.0 (contraction guarantee).

fallback_chain.description: Ordered list of fallback role names if this role fails.

eu_ai_act_articles.description: EU AI Act articles this role's governance satisfies

owasp_controls.description: OWASP Agentic AI Top 10 controls implemented by this role

thinking_tokens.description: Reasoning token budget for this role. 0 = audit-only/structured generation mode.

tools.description: Tool IDs accessible to this role (from DGAF_TOOLS registry).

default_precision.description: Default inference precision. BF16 required for Herald (audit) roles.

eval_suite_version.description: Version of dgaf_eval_suite.py used to validate this governance.yml
